title: stelis gemma
intro: Stelis gemma, also known as the Yellowbird Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis gemma include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis gemma are often made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water to create teas or tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
